```{r}
safe_test_p <- function(test_obj) {
  if (is.null(test_obj)) return(NA_real_)
  if (!("p.value" %in% names(test_obj))) return(NA_real_)
  p <- test_obj$p.value
  if (is.null(p) || length(p) == 0) return(NA_real_)
  as.numeric(p[1])
}

safe_test_stat <- function(test_obj) {
  if (is.null(test_obj)) return(NA_real_)
  if (!("statistic" %in% names(test_obj))) return(NA_real_)
  s <- test_obj$statistic
  if (is.null(s) || length(s) == 0) return(NA_real_)
  as.numeric(s[1])
}

safe_kruskal_test <- function(residual, group) {
  keep <- is.finite(residual) & !is.na(group)
  residual <- residual[keep]
  group <- group[keep]

  if (length(residual) == 0) return(NULL)
  if (length(unique(group)) < 2) return(NULL)

  tryCatch(
    kruskal.test(residual ~ group),
    error = function(e) NULL
  )
}

# =========================================================
# DATEN
# Erwartet:
# TRT, Position, Category, Determination, AOI, nLetters,
# Participant, Topic, aggr_level
# =========================================================

prep_encap_mt1_trt_residual_data <- function(df) {
  needed <- c(
    "TRT", "Position", "Category", "Determination", "AOI",
    "nLetters", "Participant", "Topic", "aggr_level"
  )

  missing_cols <- setdiff(needed, names(df))
  if (length(missing_cols) > 0) {
    stop("Fehlende Variablen: ", paste(missing_cols, collapse = ", "))
  }

  out <- df %>%
    filter(!is.na(TRT), TRT > 0) %>%
    filter(!is.na(Position), !is.na(Category), !is.na(Determination), !is.na(AOI), !is.na(nLetters)) %>%
    filter(!is.na(Participant), !is.na(Topic), !is.na(aggr_level)) %>%
    mutate(
      Position = factor(Position),
      Category = factor(Category),
      Determination = factor(Determination),
      AOI = factor(AOI),
      Participant = factor(Participant),
      Topic = factor(Topic),
      aggr_level = factor(aggr_level)
    )

  cluster_sizes <- out %>%
    distinct(aggr_level, AOI) %>%
    count(aggr_level, name = "n_aoi_in_cluster")

  list(
    data = safe_plain_df(out),
    cluster_sizes = cluster_sizes
  )
}

# =========================================================
# FORMELN PRO CLUSTER
# =========================================================

make_formula_cluster_encap_mt1_trt <- function(response = "TRT",
                                               n_aoi_in_cluster = 1L) {
  rhs <- if (n_aoi_in_cluster > 1) {
    paste(
      "Position*AOI + Category*AOI + Determination*AOI +",
      "Position:Category*AOI + Position:Determination*AOI +",
      "nLetters + (1 | Topic) + (1 | Participant)"
    )
  } else {
    paste(
      "Position + Category + Determination +",
      "Position:Category + Position:Determination +",
      "nLetters + (1 | Topic) + (1 | Participant)"
    )
  }

  as.formula(paste(response, "~", rhs))
}

# =========================================================
# FIT MIT FEHLER- UND WARNING-CATCHING
# =========================================================

fit_glmmtmb_capture_trt_encap_mt1 <- function(df, formula) {
  warn_texts <- character()
  msg_texts  <- character()

  fit <- withCallingHandlers(
    tryCatch(
      glmmTMB::glmmTMB(
        formula = formula,
        data = droplevels(df),
        family = Gamma(link = "log")
      ),
      error = function(e) e
    ),
    warning = function(w) {
      warn_texts <<- c(warn_texts, conditionMessage(w))
      invokeRestart("muffleWarning")
    },
    message = function(m) {
      msg_texts <<- c(msg_texts, conditionMessage(m))
      invokeRestart("muffleMessage")
    }
  )

  if (inherits(fit, "error")) {
    return(list(
      fit_tbl = tibble(
        fit_ok = FALSE,
        fit_error = conditionMessage(fit),
        fit_warning_text = collapse_unique(warn_texts),
        fit_message_text = collapse_unique(msg_texts),
        n_warning_messages = length(unique(stats::na.omit(warn_texts))),
        n_messages = length(unique(stats::na.omit(msg_texts))),
        fit_nonposdef_hessian = NA,
        fit_nonzero_convergence = NA,
        aic = NA_real_,
        bic = NA_real_,
        logLik = NA_real_
      ),
      fit_obj = NULL
    ))
  }

  fit_nonposdef_hessian <- tryCatch(
    !isTRUE(fit$sdr$pdHess),
    error = function(e) NA
  )

  fit_nonzero_convergence <- tryCatch(
    {
      conv <- fit$fit$convergence
      if (is.null(conv)) NA else conv != 0
    },
    error = function(e) NA
  )

  list(
    fit_tbl = tibble(
      fit_ok = TRUE,
      fit_error = NA_character_,
      fit_warning_text = collapse_unique(warn_texts),
      fit_message_text = collapse_unique(msg_texts),
      n_warning_messages = length(unique(stats::na.omit(warn_texts))),
      n_messages = length(unique(stats::na.omit(msg_texts))),
      fit_nonposdef_hessian = fit_nonposdef_hessian,
      fit_nonzero_convergence = fit_nonzero_convergence,
      aic = tryCatch(as.numeric(AIC(fit)), error = function(e) NA_real_),
      bic = tryCatch(as.numeric(BIC(fit)), error = function(e) NA_real_),
      logLik = tryCatch(as.numeric(logLik(fit)), error = function(e) NA_real_)
    ),
    fit_obj = fit
  )
}

# =========================================================
# DHARMa-ANALYSE
# =========================================================

analyse_dharma_trt_encap_mt1 <- function(fit_obj, df, group_var, nsim = 2000) {
  simres <- DHARMa::simulateResiduals(
    fittedModel = fit_obj,
    n = nsim,
    plot = FALSE
  )

  dharma_res <- simres$scaledResiduals
  fitted_vals <- tryCatch(
    predict(fit_obj, type = "response", re.form = NULL),
    error = function(e) rep(NA_real_, nrow(df))
  )

  uniform_test <- tryCatch(
    DHARMa::testUniformity(simres),
    error = function(e) NULL
  )

  dispersion_test <- tryCatch(
    DHARMa::testDispersion(simres),
    error = function(e) NULL
  )

  outlier_test <- tryCatch(
    DHARMa::testOutliers(simres),
    error = function(e) NULL
  )

  categorical_test_dharma <- tryCatch(
    DHARMa::testCategorical(simres, catPred = group_var),
    error = function(e) NULL
  )

  categorical_test_kruskal <- safe_kruskal_test(
    residual = dharma_res,
    group = group_var
  )

  quantiles_warn <- character()
  quantiles_test <- withCallingHandlers(
    tryCatch(
      DHARMa::testQuantiles(simres, predictor = df$nLetters),
      error = function(e) e
    ),
    warning = function(w) {
      quantiles_warn <<- c(quantiles_warn, conditionMessage(w))
      invokeRestart("muffleWarning")
    }
  )

  quantiles_error <- if (inherits(quantiles_test, "error")) {
    conditionMessage(quantiles_test)
  } else {
    NA_character_
  }

  if (inherits(quantiles_test, "error")) {
    quantiles_test <- NULL
  }

  categorical_warn <- character()
  categorical_test_dharma2 <- withCallingHandlers(
    tryCatch(
      DHARMa::testCategorical(simres, catPred = group_var),
      error = function(e) e
    ),
    warning = function(w) {
      categorical_warn <<- c(categorical_warn, conditionMessage(w))
      invokeRestart("muffleWarning")
    }
  )

  categorical_error <- if (inherits(categorical_test_dharma2, "error")) {
    conditionMessage(categorical_test_dharma2)
  } else {
    NA_character_
  }

  if (!inherits(categorical_test_dharma2, "error")) {
    categorical_test_dharma <- categorical_test_dharma2
  }

  dharma_categorical_stat <- safe_test_stat(categorical_test_dharma)
  dharma_categorical_p <- safe_test_p(categorical_test_dharma)

  if (is.na(dharma_categorical_p) && !is.null(categorical_test_kruskal)) {
    dharma_categorical_stat <- safe_test_stat(categorical_test_kruskal)
    dharma_categorical_p <- safe_test_p(categorical_test_kruskal)
  }

  residual_summary <- tibble(
    n_obs_residuals = nrow(df),
    residual_mean = mean(dharma_res, na.rm = TRUE),
    residual_median = median(dharma_res, na.rm = TRUE),
    residual_sd = stats::sd(dharma_res, na.rm = TRUE),
    residual_min = min(dharma_res, na.rm = TRUE),
    residual_max = max(dharma_res, na.rm = TRUE),
    prop_resid_lt_0_05 = mean(dharma_res < 0.05, na.rm = TRUE),
    prop_resid_gt_0_95 = mean(dharma_res > 0.95, na.rm = TRUE),
    cor_resid_fitted = safe_cor(dharma_res, fitted_vals),
    cor_resid_nLetters = safe_cor(dharma_res, df$nLetters),
    dharma_uniformity_stat = safe_test_stat(uniform_test),
    dharma_uniformity_p = safe_test_p(uniform_test),
    dharma_dispersion_stat = safe_test_stat(dispersion_test),
    dharma_dispersion_p = safe_test_p(dispersion_test),
    dharma_outlier_stat = safe_test_stat(outlier_test),
    dharma_outlier_p = safe_test_p(outlier_test),
    dharma_categorical_stat = dharma_categorical_stat,
    dharma_categorical_p = dharma_categorical_p,
    dharma_quantiles_stat = safe_test_stat(quantiles_test),
    dharma_quantiles_p = safe_test_p(quantiles_test),
    dharma_categorical_warning = collapse_unique(categorical_warn),
    dharma_categorical_error = categorical_error,
    dharma_quantiles_warning = collapse_unique(quantiles_warn),
    dharma_quantiles_error = quantiles_error
  )

  plot_data <- tibble(
    fitted = fitted_vals,
    residual = dharma_res,
    nLetters = df$nLetters,
    observed = df$TRT
  )

  list(
    simres = simres,
    residual_summary = residual_summary,
    plot_data = plot_data,
    tests = list(
      uniform_test = uniform_test,
      dispersion_test = dispersion_test,
      outlier_test = outlier_test,
      categorical_test_dharma = categorical_test_dharma,
      categorical_test_kruskal = categorical_test_kruskal,
      quantiles_test = quantiles_test
    )
  )
}

# =========================================================
# PROBLEMTYP
# =========================================================

classify_problem_trt_residual <- function(fit_ok,
                                          fit_error,
                                          fit_nonposdef_hessian,
                                          fit_nonzero_convergence,
                                          fit_warning_text,
                                          dharma_uniformity_p,
                                          dharma_dispersion_p,
                                          dharma_outlier_p,
                                          dharma_categorical_p,
                                          dharma_quantiles_p,
                                          dharma_categorical_warning,
                                          dharma_quantiles_warning,
                                          dharma_categorical_error,
                                          dharma_quantiles_error) {
  txt <- paste(
    c(
      fit_error,
      fit_warning_text,
      dharma_categorical_warning,
      dharma_quantiles_warning,
      dharma_categorical_error,
      dharma_quantiles_error
    ),
    collapse = " | "
  )

  case_when(
    !isTRUE(fit_ok) ~ "fit_error",
    isTRUE(fit_nonposdef_hessian) ~ "nonposdef_hessian",
    isTRUE(fit_nonzero_convergence) ~ "nonzero_convergence",
    !is.na(dharma_uniformity_p) && dharma_uniformity_p < 0.05 &&
      !is.na(dharma_dispersion_p) && dharma_dispersion_p < 0.05 ~
      "uniformity_and_dispersion_signal",
    !is.na(dharma_uniformity_p) && dharma_uniformity_p < 0.05 &&
      !is.na(dharma_categorical_p) && dharma_categorical_p < 0.05 ~
      "uniformity_and_categorical_signal",
    !is.na(dharma_uniformity_p) && dharma_uniformity_p < 0.05 ~
      "uniformity_signal",
    !is.na(dharma_dispersion_p) && dharma_dispersion_p < 0.05 ~
      "dispersion_signal",
    !is.na(dharma_outlier_p) && dharma_outlier_p < 0.05 ~
      "outlier_signal",
    !is.na(dharma_categorical_p) && dharma_categorical_p < 0.05 ~
      "categorical_signal",
    !is.na(dharma_quantiles_p) && dharma_quantiles_p < 0.05 ~
      "quantiles_signal",
    str_detect(txt, regex("outer Newton did not converge fully|step failure", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~
      "diagnostic_test_warning",
    str_detect(txt, regex("rank-deficient|dropping columns|dropp.*column", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~
      "rank_deficiency_signal",
    !is.na(fit_warning_text) ~ "warning_only",
    TRUE ~ "none"
  )
}

# =========================================================
# PLOTFUNKTIONEN
# =========================================================

plot_trt_residuals_vs_fitted <- function(plot_data, aggr_label, idx) {
  ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = fitted, y = residual)) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.5) +
    labs(
      title = paste0("[", idx, "/4] TRT Residuals vs Fitted | ", aggr_label),
      x = "Fitted values",
      y = "DHARMa residuals"
    )
}

plot_trt_residuals_vs_nLetters <- function(plot_data, aggr_label, idx) {
  ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = nLetters, y = residual)) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.5) +
    labs(
      title = paste0("[", idx, "/4] TRT Residuals vs nLetters | ", aggr_label),
      x = "nLetters",
      y = "DHARMa residuals"
    )
}

plot_trt_observed_vs_fitted <- function(plot_data, aggr_label, idx) {
  ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = fitted, y = observed)) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.5) +
    labs(
      title = paste0("[", idx, "/4] TRT Observed vs Fitted | ", aggr_label),
      x = "Fitted values",
      y = "Observed TRT"
    )
}

# =========================================================
# EIN FULL-DATA-FIT PRO aggr_level
# =========================================================

fit_one_full_case_encap_mt1_trt_residual <- function(df_aggr,
                                                     formula,
                                                     group_var,
                                                     exp_name = "encap_mt1",
                                                     aggr_i,
                                                     n_aoi_in_cluster,
                                                     nsim = 2000) {
  df_aggr <- droplevels(df_aggr)

  fit_res <- fit_glmmtmb_capture_trt_encap_mt1(
    df = df_aggr,
    formula = formula
  )

  fit_info <- fit_res$fit_tbl
  fit_obj  <- fit_res$fit_obj

  if (is.null(fit_obj)) {
    summary_tbl <- tibble(
      experiment = exp_name,
      aggr_level = aggr_i,
      n_aoi_in_cluster = n_aoi_in_cluster,
      cluster_formula_type = ifelse(n_aoi_in_cluster > 1, "Position_AOI_plus", "Position_only_plus"),
      n_obs = nrow(df_aggr),
      n_topics = dplyr::n_distinct(df_aggr$Topic),
      n_participants = dplyr::n_distinct(df_aggr$Participant),
      n_Position = dplyr::n_distinct(df_aggr$Position),
      n_Category = dplyr::n_distinct(df_aggr$Category),
      n_Determination = dplyr::n_distinct(df_aggr$Determination),
      n_AOI = dplyr::n_distinct(df_aggr$AOI),
      formula = paste(deparse(formula), collapse = " ")
    ) %>%
      bind_cols(fit_info) %>%
      mutate(
        n_obs_residuals = NA_real_,
        residual_mean = NA_real_,
        residual_median = NA_real_,
        residual_sd = NA_real_,
        residual_min = NA_real_,
        residual_max = NA_real_,
        prop_resid_lt_0_05 = NA_real_,
        prop_resid_gt_0_95 = NA_real_,
        cor_resid_fitted = NA_real_,
        cor_resid_nLetters = NA_real_,
        dharma_uniformity_stat = NA_real_,
        dharma_uniformity_p = NA_real_,
        dharma_dispersion_stat = NA_real_,
        dharma_dispersion_p = NA_real_,
        dharma_outlier_stat = NA_real_,
        dharma_outlier_p = NA_real_,
        dharma_categorical_stat = NA_real_,
        dharma_categorical_p = NA_real_,
        dharma_quantiles_stat = NA_real_,
        dharma_quantiles_p = NA_real_,
        dharma_categorical_warning = NA_character_,
        dharma_categorical_error = NA_character_,
        dharma_quantiles_warning = NA_character_,
        dharma_quantiles_error = NA_character_,
        problem_type = "fit_error"
      )

    return(list(
      summary_tbl = summary_tbl,
      simres = NULL,
      plot_data = NULL,
      tests = NULL
    ))
  }

  dharma_res <- analyse_dharma_trt_encap_mt1(
    fit_obj = fit_obj,
    df = df_aggr,
    group_var = group_var,
    nsim = nsim
  )

  summary_tbl <- tibble(
    experiment = exp_name,
    aggr_level = aggr_i,
    n_aoi_in_cluster = n_aoi_in_cluster,
    cluster_formula_type = ifelse(n_aoi_in_cluster > 1, "Position_AOI_plus", "Position_only_plus"),
    n_obs = nrow(df_aggr),
    n_topics = dplyr::n_distinct(df_aggr$Topic),
    n_participants = dplyr::n_distinct(df_aggr$Participant),
    n_Position = dplyr::n_distinct(df_aggr$Position),
    n_Category = dplyr::n_distinct(df_aggr$Category),
    n_Determination = dplyr::n_distinct(df_aggr$Determination),
    n_AOI = dplyr::n_distinct(df_aggr$AOI),
    formula = paste(deparse(formula), collapse = " ")
  ) %>%
    bind_cols(fit_info) %>%
    bind_cols(dharma_res$residual_summary) %>%
    mutate(
      problem_type = classify_problem_trt_residual(
        fit_ok = fit_ok,
        fit_error = fit_error,
        fit_nonposdef_hessian = fit_nonposdef_hessian,
        fit_nonzero_convergence = fit_nonzero_convergence,
        fit_warning_text = fit_warning_text,
        dharma_uniformity_p = dharma_uniformity_p,
        dharma_dispersion_p = dharma_dispersion_p,
        dharma_outlier_p = dharma_outlier_p,
        dharma_categorical_p = dharma_categorical_p,
        dharma_quantiles_p = dharma_quantiles_p,
        dharma_categorical_warning = dharma_categorical_warning,
        dharma_quantiles_warning = dharma_quantiles_warning,
        dharma_categorical_error = dharma_categorical_error,
        dharma_quantiles_error = dharma_quantiles_error
      )
    )

  list(
    summary_tbl = summary_tbl,
    simres = dharma_res$simres,
    plot_data = dharma_res$plot_data,
    tests = dharma_res$tests
  )
}

# =========================================================
# AUTOMATISCHE PLOTAUSGABE
# =========================================================

print_all_trt_residual_plots <- function(res_obj) {
  aggr_levels <- names(res_obj$plot_data_list)

  for (i in seq_along(aggr_levels)) {
    aggr_i <- aggr_levels[i]
    plot_data <- res_obj$plot_data_list[[aggr_i]]
    simres <- res_obj$simres_list[[aggr_i]]

    if (is.null(plot_data) || is.null(simres)) next

    print(plot_trt_residuals_vs_fitted(plot_data, aggr_i, 1))
    print(plot_trt_residuals_vs_nLetters(plot_data, aggr_i, 2))
    print(plot_trt_observed_vs_fitted(plot_data, aggr_i, 3))

    graphics::plot(simres)
    graphics::mtext(
      text = paste0("[4/4] Standard DHARMa Plot | ", aggr_i),
      side = 3,
      line = 1,
      cex = 1.1,
      font = 2
    )
  }
}

# =========================================================
# HAUPTFUNKTION
# =========================================================

run_trt_residual_analysis_encap_mt1 <- function(df,
                                                exp_name = "encap_mt1",
                                                nsim = 2000,
                                                print_plots = TRUE) {
  prep <- prep_encap_mt1_trt_residual_data(df)
  dat <- prep$data
  cluster_sizes <- prep$cluster_sizes

  aggr_levels <- unique(as.character(dat$aggr_level))

  res_list <- purrr::map(aggr_levels, function(aggr_i) {
    df_aggr <- dat %>%
      filter(as.character(aggr_level) == aggr_i)

    n_aoi_cluster <- cluster_sizes$n_aoi_in_cluster[
      match(aggr_i, cluster_sizes$aggr_level)
    ]

    formula_i <- make_formula_cluster_encap_mt1_trt(
      response = "TRT",
      n_aoi_in_cluster = n_aoi_cluster
    )

    group_var <- if (n_aoi_cluster > 1) {
      interaction(
        df_aggr$Position,
        df_aggr$Category,
        df_aggr$Determination,
        df_aggr$AOI,
        drop = TRUE
      )
    } else {
      interaction(
        df_aggr$Position,
        df_aggr$Category,
        df_aggr$Determination,
        drop = TRUE
      )
    }

    fit_one_full_case_encap_mt1_trt_residual(
      df_aggr = df_aggr,
      formula = formula_i,
      group_var = group_var,
      exp_name = exp_name,
      aggr_i = aggr_i,
      n_aoi_in_cluster = n_aoi_cluster,
      nsim = nsim
    )
  })

  names(res_list) <- aggr_levels

  residual_summary <- purrr::map_dfr(res_list, "summary_tbl")

  problem_counts <- residual_summary %>%
    count(problem_type, sort = TRUE)

  problem_fits_only <- residual_summary %>%
    filter(problem_type != "none") %>%
    arrange(aggr_level)

  plot_data_list <- purrr::map(res_list, "plot_data")
  simres_list <- purrr::map(res_list, "simres")
  tests_list <- purrr::map(res_list, "tests")

  out <- list(
    residual_summary = residual_summary,
    problem_counts = problem_counts,
    problem_fits_only = problem_fits_only,
    plot_data_list = plot_data_list,
    simres_list = simres_list,
    tests_list = tests_list,
    raw_results = res_list
  )

  if (isTRUE(print_plots)) {
    print_all_trt_residual_plots(out)
  }

  out
}

# =========================================================
# AUSFÜHREN
# =========================================================

res_trt_residuals_encap_mt1 <- run_trt_residual_analysis_encap_mt1(
  df = encap_mt1,
  exp_name = "encap_mt1",
  nsim = 2000,
  print_plots = TRUE
)

# =========================================================
# TABELLEN
# =========================================================

round_df_4(res_trt_residuals_encap_mt1$residual_summary)
round_df_4(res_trt_residuals_encap_mt1$problem_counts)
round_df_4(res_trt_residuals_encap_mt1$problem_fits_only)
```
Experiment: Anaphoric Encapsulation 1
In der DHARMa-Analyse für TRT treten keine Fit-Probleme auf. Die Auffälligkeiten liegen daher nicht in der Schätzung selbst, sondern in der Residualdiagnostik. In allen drei Clustern ist der Uniformitätstest signifikant, mit p-Werten von 0.0180, 0.0052 und 0.0001. Das spricht dafür, dass die Residuen systematisch von der erwarteten Gleichverteilung abweichen und die Modellannahmen damit nicht vollständig erfüllt sind. Zusätzlich zeigen zwei Cluster signifikante Outlier-Tests, was auf einzelne Beobachtungen mit besonders schlechter Modellanpassung hindeutet. Dagegen bleiben die Dispersionstests unauffällig, sodass kein Hinweis auf eine generelle Über- oder Unterdispersion vorliegt. Insgesamt deutet die Residualanalyse damit nicht auf einen vollständigen Modellbruch hin, wohl aber auf konsistente Missanpassungen der Verteilungsform, ergänzt um einzelne Ausreißer in Teilen der Modelle. Die TRT-Modelle sind daher inhaltlich interpretierbar, sollten aber mit diagnostischer Vorsicht eingeordnet werden, da die Residuen die Modellannahmen nicht in allen Clustern vollständig stützen.

```{r}
p_trt_resid_fitted_45 <- plot_trt_residuals_vs_fitted(
  plot_data = res_trt_residuals_encap_mt1$plot_data_list[["4, 5"]],
  aggr_label = "4, 5",
  idx = 1
)

p_trt_resid_fitted_45
ggsave(
  filename = "encap_mt1_TRT_residuals_vs_fitted_aggr_4_5.png",
  plot = p_trt_resid_fitted_45,
  width = 7,
  height = 5,
  dpi = 300
)
```


*DHARMa und Residual Analyse für FRT*
```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(purrr)
library(tibble)
library(stringr)
library(glmmTMB)
library(lme4)
library(DHARMa)
library(ggplot2)

# =========================================================
# SETTINGS
# =========================================================

set.seed(123)

# =========================================================
# HILFSFUNKTIONEN
# =========================================================

safe_plain_df <- function(df) {
  out <- as.data.frame(df, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
  rownames(out) <- NULL
  out
}

round_df_4 <- function(df) {
  df %>%
    mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~ round(.x, 4)))
}

collapse_unique <- function(x) {
  x <- unique(stats::na.omit(x))
  if (length(x) == 0) return(NA_character_)
  paste(x, collapse = " | ")
}

safe_cor <- function(x, y) {
  keep <- is.finite(x) & is.finite(y)
  x <- x[keep]
  y <- y[keep]

  if (length(x) < 3) return(NA_real_)
  suppressWarnings(stats::cor(x, y))
}

safe_test_p <- function(test_obj) {
  if (is.null(test_obj)) return(NA_real_)
  if (!("p.value" %in% names(test_obj))) return(NA_real_)
  p <- test_obj$p.value
  if (is.null(p) || length(p) == 0) return(NA_real_)
  as.numeric(p[1])
}

safe_test_stat <- function(test_obj) {
  if (is.null(test_obj)) return(NA_real_)
  if (!("statistic" %in% names(test_obj))) return(NA_real_)
  s <- test_obj$statistic
  if (is.null(s) || length(s) == 0) return(NA_real_)
  as.numeric(s[1])
}

safe_kruskal_test <- function(residual, group) {
  keep <- is.finite(residual) & !is.na(group)
  residual <- residual[keep]
  group <- group[keep]

  if (length(residual) == 0) return(NULL)
  if (length(unique(group)) < 2) return(NULL)

  tryCatch(
    kruskal.test(residual ~ group),
    error = function(e) NULL
  )
}

# =========================================================
# DATEN
# Erwartet:
# FRT, Position, Category, Determination, AOI, nLetters,
# Participant, Topic, aggr_level
# =========================================================

prep_encap_mt1_frt_residual_data <- function(df) {
  needed <- c(
    "FRT", "Position", "Category", "Determination", "AOI",
    "nLetters", "Participant", "Topic", "aggr_level"
  )

  missing_cols <- setdiff(needed, names(df))
  if (length(missing_cols) > 0) {
    stop("Fehlende Variablen: ", paste(missing_cols, collapse = ", "))
  }

  out <- df %>%
    filter(!is.na(FRT), FRT > 0) %>%
    filter(!is.na(Position), !is.na(Category), !is.na(Determination), !is.na(AOI), !is.na(nLetters)) %>%
    filter(!is.na(Participant), !is.na(Topic), !is.na(aggr_level)) %>%
    mutate(
      Position = factor(Position),
      Category = factor(Category),
      Determination = factor(Determination),
      AOI = factor(AOI),
      Participant = factor(Participant),
      Topic = factor(Topic),
      aggr_level = factor(aggr_level)
    )

  cluster_sizes <- out %>%
    distinct(aggr_level, AOI) %>%
    count(aggr_level, name = "n_aoi_in_cluster")

  list(
    data = safe_plain_df(out),
    cluster_sizes = cluster_sizes
  )
}

# =========================================================
# FORMELN PRO CLUSTER
# =========================================================

make_formula_cluster_encap_mt1_frt <- function(response = "FRT",
                                               n_aoi_in_cluster = 1L) {
  rhs <- if (n_aoi_in_cluster > 1) {
    paste(
      "Position*AOI + Category*AOI + Determination*AOI +",
      "Position:Category*AOI + Position:Determination*AOI +",
      "nLetters + (1 | Topic) + (1 | Participant)"
    )
  } else {
    paste(
      "Position + Category + Determination +",
      "Position:Category + Position:Determination +",
      "nLetters + (1 | Topic) + (1 | Participant)"
    )
  }

  as.formula(paste(response, "~", rhs))
}

# =========================================================
# FIT MIT FEHLER- UND WARNING-CATCHING
# =========================================================

fit_glmmtmb_capture_frt_encap_mt1 <- function(df, formula) {
  warn_texts <- character()
  msg_texts  <- character()

  fit <- withCallingHandlers(
    tryCatch(
      glmmTMB::glmmTMB(
        formula = formula,
        data = droplevels(df),
        family = Gamma(link = "log")
      ),
      error = function(e) e
    ),
    warning = function(w) {
      warn_texts <<- c(warn_texts, conditionMessage(w))
      invokeRestart("muffleWarning")
    },
    message = function(m) {
      msg_texts <<- c(msg_texts, conditionMessage(m))
      invokeRestart("muffleMessage")
    }
  )

  if (inherits(fit, "error")) {
    return(list(
      fit_tbl = tibble(
        fit_ok = FALSE,
        fit_error = conditionMessage(fit),
        fit_warning_text = collapse_unique(warn_texts),
        fit_message_text = collapse_unique(msg_texts),
        n_warning_messages = length(unique(stats::na.omit(warn_texts))),
        n_messages = length(unique(stats::na.omit(msg_texts))),
        fit_nonposdef_hessian = NA,
        fit_nonzero_convergence = NA,
        aic = NA_real_,
        bic = NA_real_,
        logLik = NA_real_
      ),
      fit_obj = NULL
    ))
  }

  fit_nonposdef_hessian <- tryCatch(
    !isTRUE(fit$sdr$pdHess),
    error = function(e) NA
  )

  fit_nonzero_convergence <- tryCatch(
    {
      conv <- fit$fit$convergence
      if (is.null(conv)) NA else conv != 0
    },
    error = function(e) NA
  )

  list(
    fit_tbl = tibble(
      fit_ok = TRUE,
      fit_error = NA_character_,
      fit_warning_text = collapse_unique(warn_texts),
      fit_message_text = collapse_unique(msg_texts),
      n_warning_messages = length(unique(stats::na.omit(warn_texts))),
      n_messages = length(unique(stats::na.omit(msg_texts))),
      fit_nonposdef_hessian = fit_nonposdef_hessian,
      fit_nonzero_convergence = fit_nonzero_convergence,
      aic = tryCatch(as.numeric(AIC(fit)), error = function(e) NA_real_),
      bic = tryCatch(as.numeric(BIC(fit)), error = function(e) NA_real_),
      logLik = tryCatch(as.numeric(logLik(fit)), error = function(e) NA_real_)
    ),
    fit_obj = fit
  )
}

# =========================================================
# DHARMa-ANALYSE
# =========================================================

analyse_dharma_frt_encap_mt1 <- function(fit_obj, df, group_var, nsim = 2000) {
  simres <- DHARMa::simulateResiduals(
    fittedModel = fit_obj,
    n = nsim,
    plot = FALSE
  )

  dharma_res <- simres$scaledResiduals
  fitted_vals <- tryCatch(
    predict(fit_obj, type = "response", re.form = NULL),
    error = function(e) rep(NA_real_, nrow(df))
  )

  uniform_test <- tryCatch(
    DHARMa::testUniformity(simres),
    error = function(e) NULL
  )

  dispersion_test <- tryCatch(
    DHARMa::testDispersion(simres),
    error = function(e) NULL
  )

  outlier_test <- tryCatch(
    DHARMa::testOutliers(simres),
    error = function(e) NULL
  )

  categorical_test_dharma <- tryCatch(
    DHARMa::testCategorical(simres, catPred = group_var),
    error = function(e) NULL
  )

  categorical_test_kruskal <- safe_kruskal_test(
    residual = dharma_res,
    group = group_var
  )

  quantiles_warn <- character()
  quantiles_test <- withCallingHandlers(
    tryCatch(
      DHARMa::testQuantiles(simres, predictor = df$nLetters),
      error = function(e) e
    ),
    warning = function(w) {
      quantiles_warn <<- c(quantiles_warn, conditionMessage(w))
      invokeRestart("muffleWarning")
    }
  )

  quantiles_error <- if (inherits(quantiles_test, "error")) {
    conditionMessage(quantiles_test)
  } else {
    NA_character_
  }

  if (inherits(quantiles_test, "error")) {
    quantiles_test <- NULL
  }

  categorical_warn <- character()
  categorical_test_dharma2 <- withCallingHandlers(
    tryCatch(
      DHARMa::testCategorical(simres, catPred = group_var),
      error = function(e) e
    ),
    warning = function(w) {
      categorical_warn <<- c(categorical_warn, conditionMessage(w))
      invokeRestart("muffleWarning")
    }
  )

  categorical_error <- if (inherits(categorical_test_dharma2, "error")) {
    conditionMessage(categorical_test_dharma2)
  } else {
    NA_character_
  }

  if (!inherits(categorical_test_dharma2, "error")) {
    categorical_test_dharma <- categorical_test_dharma2
  }

  dharma_categorical_stat <- safe_test_stat(categorical_test_dharma)
  dharma_categorical_p <- safe_test_p(categorical_test_dharma)

  if (is.na(dharma_categorical_p) && !is.null(categorical_test_kruskal)) {
    dharma_categorical_stat <- safe_test_stat(categorical_test_kruskal)
    dharma_categorical_p <- safe_test_p(categorical_test_kruskal)
  }

  residual_summary <- tibble(
    n_obs_residuals = nrow(df),
    residual_mean = mean(dharma_res, na.rm = TRUE),
    residual_median = median(dharma_res, na.rm = TRUE),
    residual_sd = stats::sd(dharma_res, na.rm = TRUE),
    residual_min = min(dharma_res, na.rm = TRUE),
    residual_max = max(dharma_res, na.rm = TRUE),
    prop_resid_lt_0_05 = mean(dharma_res < 0.05, na.rm = TRUE),
    prop_resid_gt_0_95 = mean(dharma_res > 0.95, na.rm = TRUE),
    cor_resid_fitted = safe_cor(dharma_res, fitted_vals),
    cor_resid_nLetters = safe_cor(dharma_res, df$nLetters),
    dharma_uniformity_stat = safe_test_stat(uniform_test),
    dharma_uniformity_p = safe_test_p(uniform_test),
    dharma_dispersion_stat = safe_test_stat(dispersion_test),
    dharma_dispersion_p = safe_test_p(dispersion_test),
    dharma_outlier_stat = safe_test_stat(outlier_test),
    dharma_outlier_p = safe_test_p(outlier_test),
    dharma_categorical_stat = dharma_categorical_stat,
    dharma_categorical_p = dharma_categorical_p,
    dharma_quantiles_stat = safe_test_stat(quantiles_test),
    dharma_quantiles_p = safe_test_p(quantiles_test),
    dharma_categorical_warning = collapse_unique(categorical_warn),
    dharma_categorical_error = categorical_error,
    dharma_quantiles_warning = collapse_unique(quantiles_warn),
    dharma_quantiles_error = quantiles_error
  )

  plot_data <- tibble(
    fitted = fitted_vals,
    residual = dharma_res,
    nLetters = df$nLetters,
    observed = df$FRT
  )

  list(
    simres = simres,
    residual_summary = residual_summary,
    plot_data = plot_data,
    tests = list(
      uniform_test = uniform_test,
      dispersion_test = dispersion_test,
      outlier_test = outlier_test,
      categorical_test_dharma = categorical_test_dharma,
      categorical_test_kruskal = categorical_test_kruskal,
      quantiles_test = quantiles_test
    )
  )
}

# =========================================================
# PROBLEMTYP
# =========================================================

classify_problem_frt_residual <- function(fit_ok,
                                          fit_error,
                                          fit_nonposdef_hessian,
                                          fit_nonzero_convergence,
                                          fit_warning_text,
                                          dharma_uniformity_p,
                                          dharma_dispersion_p,
                                          dharma_outlier_p,
                                          dharma_categorical_p,
                                          dharma_quantiles_p,
                                          dharma_categorical_warning,
                                          dharma_quantiles_warning,
                                          dharma_categorical_error,
                                          dharma_quantiles_error) {
  txt <- paste(
    c(
      fit_error,
      fit_warning_text,
      dharma_categorical_warning,
      dharma_quantiles_warning,
      dharma_categorical_error,
      dharma_quantiles_error
    ),
    collapse = " | "
  )

  case_when(
    !isTRUE(fit_ok) ~ "fit_error",
    isTRUE(fit_nonposdef_hessian) ~ "nonposdef_hessian",
    isTRUE(fit_nonzero_convergence) ~ "nonzero_convergence",
    !is.na(dharma_uniformity_p) && dharma_uniformity_p < 0.05 &&
      !is.na(dharma_dispersion_p) && dharma_dispersion_p < 0.05 ~
      "uniformity_and_dispersion_signal",
    !is.na(dharma_uniformity_p) && dharma_uniformity_p < 0.05 &&
      !is.na(dharma_categorical_p) && dharma_categorical_p < 0.05 ~
      "uniformity_and_categorical_signal",
    !is.na(dharma_uniformity_p) && dharma_uniformity_p < 0.05 ~
      "uniformity_signal",
    !is.na(dharma_dispersion_p) && dharma_dispersion_p < 0.05 ~
      "dispersion_signal",
    !is.na(dharma_outlier_p) && dharma_outlier_p < 0.05 ~
      "outlier_signal",
    !is.na(dharma_categorical_p) && dharma_categorical_p < 0.05 ~
      "categorical_signal",
    !is.na(dharma_quantiles_p) && dharma_quantiles_p < 0.05 ~
      "quantiles_signal",
    str_detect(txt, regex("outer Newton did not converge fully|step failure", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~
      "diagnostic_test_warning",
    str_detect(txt, regex("rank-deficient|dropping columns|dropp.*column", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~
      "rank_deficiency_signal",
    !is.na(fit_warning_text) ~ "warning_only",
    TRUE ~ "none"
  )
}

# =========================================================
# PLOTFUNKTIONEN
# =========================================================

plot_frt_residuals_vs_fitted <- function(plot_data, aggr_label, idx) {
  ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = fitted, y = residual)) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.5) +
    labs(
      title = paste0("[", idx, "/4] FRT Residuals vs Fitted | ", aggr_label),
      x = "Fitted values",
      y = "DHARMa residuals"
    )
}

plot_frt_residuals_vs_nLetters <- function(plot_data, aggr_label, idx) {
  ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = nLetters, y = residual)) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.5) +
    labs(
      title = paste0("[", idx, "/4] FRT Residuals vs nLetters | ", aggr_label),
      x = "nLetters",
      y = "DHARMa residuals"
    )
}

plot_frt_observed_vs_fitted <- function(plot_data, aggr_label, idx) {
  ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = fitted, y = observed)) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.5) +
    labs(
      title = paste0("[", idx, "/4] FRT Observed vs Fitted | ", aggr_label),
      x = "Fitted values",
      y = "Observed FRT"
    )
}

# =========================================================
# EIN FULL-DATA-FIT PRO aggr_level
# =========================================================

fit_one_full_case_encap_mt1_frt_residual <- function(df_aggr,
                                                     formula,
                                                     group_var,
                                                     exp_name = "encap_mt1",
                                                     aggr_i,
                                                     n_aoi_in_cluster,
                                                     nsim = 2000) {
  df_aggr <- droplevels(df_aggr)

  fit_res <- fit_glmmtmb_capture_frt_encap_mt1(
    df = df_aggr,
    formula = formula
  )

  fit_info <- fit_res$fit_tbl
  fit_obj  <- fit_res$fit_obj

  if (is.null(fit_obj)) {
    summary_tbl <- tibble(
      experiment = exp_name,
      aggr_level = aggr_i,
      n_aoi_in_cluster = n_aoi_in_cluster,
      cluster_formula_type = ifelse(n_aoi_in_cluster > 1, "Position_AOI_plus", "Position_only_plus"),
      n_obs = nrow(df_aggr),
      n_topics = dplyr::n_distinct(df_aggr$Topic),
      n_participants = dplyr::n_distinct(df_aggr$Participant),
      n_Position = dplyr::n_distinct(df_aggr$Position),
      n_Category = dplyr::n_distinct(df_aggr$Category),
      n_Determination = dplyr::n_distinct(df_aggr$Determination),
      n_AOI = dplyr::n_distinct(df_aggr$AOI),
      formula = paste(deparse(formula), collapse = " ")
    ) %>%
      bind_cols(fit_info) %>%
      mutate(
        n_obs_residuals = NA_real_,
        residual_mean = NA_real_,
        residual_median = NA_real_,
        residual_sd = NA_real_,
        residual_min = NA_real_,
        residual_max = NA_real_,
        prop_resid_lt_0_05 = NA_real_,
        prop_resid_gt_0_95 = NA_real_,
        cor_resid_fitted = NA_real_,
        cor_resid_nLetters = NA_real_,
        dharma_uniformity_stat = NA_real_,
        dharma_uniformity_p = NA_real_,
        dharma_dispersion_stat = NA_real_,
        dharma_dispersion_p = NA_real_,
        dharma_outlier_stat = NA_real_,
        dharma_outlier_p = NA_real_,
        dharma_categorical_stat = NA_real_,
        dharma_categorical_p = NA_real_,
        dharma_quantiles_stat = NA_real_,
        dharma_quantiles_p = NA_real_,
        dharma_categorical_warning = NA_character_,
        dharma_categorical_error = NA_character_,
        dharma_quantiles_warning = NA_character_,
        dharma_quantiles_error = NA_character_,
        problem_type = "fit_error"
      )

    return(list(
      summary_tbl = summary_tbl,
      simres = NULL,
      plot_data = NULL,
      tests = NULL
    ))
  }

  dharma_res <- analyse_dharma_frt_encap_mt1(
    fit_obj = fit_obj,
    df = df_aggr,
    group_var = group_var,
    nsim = nsim
  )

  summary_tbl <- tibble(
    experiment = exp_name,
    aggr_level = aggr_i,
    n_aoi_in_cluster = n_aoi_in_cluster,
    cluster_formula_type = ifelse(n_aoi_in_cluster > 1, "Position_AOI_plus", "Position_only_plus"),
    n_obs = nrow(df_aggr),
    n_topics = dplyr::n_distinct(df_aggr$Topic),
    n_participants = dplyr::n_distinct(df_aggr$Participant),
    n_Position = dplyr::n_distinct(df_aggr$Position),
    n_Category = dplyr::n_distinct(df_aggr$Category),
    n_Determination = dplyr::n_distinct(df_aggr$Determination),
    n_AOI = dplyr::n_distinct(df_aggr$AOI),
    formula = paste(deparse(formula), collapse = " ")
  ) %>%
    bind_cols(fit_info) %>%
    bind_cols(dharma_res$residual_summary) %>%
    mutate(
      problem_type = classify_problem_frt_residual(
        fit_ok = fit_ok,
        fit_error = fit_error,
        fit_nonposdef_hessian = fit_nonposdef_hessian,
        fit_nonzero_convergence = fit_nonzero_convergence,
        fit_warning_text = fit_warning_text,
        dharma_uniformity_p = dharma_uniformity_p,
        dharma_dispersion_p = dharma_dispersion_p,
        dharma_outlier_p = dharma_outlier_p,
        dharma_categorical_p = dharma_categorical_p,
        dharma_quantiles_p = dharma_quantiles_p,
        dharma_categorical_warning = dharma_categorical_warning,
        dharma_quantiles_warning = dharma_quantiles_warning,
        dharma_categorical_error = dharma_categorical_error,
        dharma_quantiles_error = dharma_quantiles_error
      )
    )

  list(
    summary_tbl = summary_tbl,
    simres = dharma_res$simres,
    plot_data = dharma_res$plot_data,
    tests = dharma_res$tests
  )
}

# =========================================================
# AUTOMATISCHE PLOTAUSGABE
# =========================================================

print_all_frt_residual_plots <- function(res_obj) {
  aggr_levels <- names(res_obj$plot_data_list)

  for (i in seq_along(aggr_levels)) {
    aggr_i <- aggr_levels[i]
    plot_data <- res_obj$plot_data_list[[aggr_i]]
    simres <- res_obj$simres_list[[aggr_i]]

    if (is.null(plot_data) || is.null(simres)) next

    print(plot_frt_residuals_vs_fitted(plot_data, aggr_i, 1))
    print(plot_frt_residuals_vs_nLetters(plot_data, aggr_i, 2))
    print(plot_frt_observed_vs_fitted(plot_data, aggr_i, 3))

    graphics::plot(simres)
    graphics::mtext(
      text = paste0("[4/4] Standard DHARMa Plot | ", aggr_i),
      side = 3,
      line = 1,
      cex = 1.1,
      font = 2
    )
  }
}

# =========================================================
# HAUPTFUNKTION
# =========================================================

run_frt_residual_analysis_encap_mt1 <- function(df,
                                                exp_name = "encap_mt1",
                                                nsim = 2000,
                                                print_plots = TRUE) {
  prep <- prep_encap_mt1_frt_residual_data(df)
  dat <- prep$data
  cluster_sizes <- prep$cluster_sizes

  aggr_levels <- unique(as.character(dat$aggr_level))

  res_list <- purrr::map(aggr_levels, function(aggr_i) {
    df_aggr <- dat %>%
      filter(as.character(aggr_level) == aggr_i)

    n_aoi_cluster <- cluster_sizes$n_aoi_in_cluster[
      match(aggr_i, cluster_sizes$aggr_level)
    ]

    formula_i <- make_formula_cluster_encap_mt1_frt(
      response = "FRT",
      n_aoi_in_cluster = n_aoi_cluster
    )

    group_var <- if (n_aoi_cluster > 1) {
      interaction(
        df_aggr$Position,
        df_aggr$Category,
        df_aggr$Determination,
        df_aggr$AOI,
        drop = TRUE
      )
    } else {
      interaction(
        df_aggr$Position,
        df_aggr$Category,
        df_aggr$Determination,
        drop = TRUE
      )
    }

    fit_one_full_case_encap_mt1_frt_residual(
      df_aggr = df_aggr,
      formula = formula_i,
      group_var = group_var,
      exp_name = exp_name,
      aggr_i = aggr_i,
      n_aoi_in_cluster = n_aoi_cluster,
      nsim = nsim
    )
  })

  names(res_list) <- aggr_levels

  residual_summary <- purrr::map_dfr(res_list, "summary_tbl")

  problem_counts <- residual_summary %>%
    count(problem_type, sort = TRUE)

  problem_fits_only <- residual_summary %>%
    filter(problem_type != "none") %>%
    arrange(aggr_level)

  plot_data_list <- purrr::map(res_list, "plot_data")
  simres_list <- purrr::map(res_list, "simres")
  tests_list <- purrr::map(res_list, "tests")

  out <- list(
    residual_summary = residual_summary,
    problem_counts = problem_counts,
    problem_fits_only = problem_fits_only,
    plot_data_list = plot_data_list,
    simres_list = simres_list,
    tests_list = tests_list,
    raw_results = res_list
  )

  if (isTRUE(print_plots)) {
    print_all_frt_residual_plots(out)
  }

  out
}

# =========================================================
# AUSFÜHREN
# =========================================================

res_frt_residuals_encap_mt1 <- run_frt_residual_analysis_encap_mt1(
  df = encap_mt1,
  exp_name = "encap_mt1",
  nsim = 2000,
  print_plots = TRUE
)

# =========================================================
# TABELLEN
# =========================================================

round_df_4(res_frt_residuals_encap_mt1$residual_summary)
round_df_4(res_frt_residuals_encap_mt1$problem_counts)
round_df_4(res_frt_residuals_encap_mt1$problem_fits_only)
```

Experiment: Anaphoric Encapsulation 1
In der DHARMa-Analyse für FRT traten keine Fit-Probleme auf. Die Auffälligkeiten liegen somit in der Residualdiagnostik. In allen drei Clustern ist der Uniformitätstest signifikant, jeweils mit p = 0, was auf systematische Abweichungen der Residuen von der erwarteten Gleichverteilung hindeutet. Darüber hinaus zeigen zwei Cluster signifikante Outlier-Tests, und in einem Cluster fällt zusätzlich der Dispersionstest signifikant aus. In einem anderen Cluster ist statt dessen der kategoriale Test signifikant, was auf modellseitig nicht vollständig erfasste Unterschiede zwischen kategorialen Gruppen hinweist. Die quantilenbezogenen Tests sind ebenfalls durchgängig auffällig. Insgesamt spricht die Residualanalyse damit nicht nur für punktuelle Ausreißer, sondern für breitere Missanpassungen der Verteilungsform und teilweise auch der Varianz- oder Gruppenstruktur. Die FRT-Modelle sind damit nicht als vollständig assumptionskonform zu bewerten und sollten inhaltlich nur unter klarer Berücksichtigung dieser diagnostischen Einschränkungen interpretiert werden.
